## Summary

Describe the change and reference the related issue.

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is limited to the issue.
- [ ] No unrelated architecture changes.
- [ ] Business formulas preserved or explicitly reviewed.
- [ ] Engine/UI output contract aligned.
- [ ] No secrets included.
- [ ] Python compilation passed.
- [ ] Relevant View-details dialog tested.
- [ ] Scenario and baseline behavior tested where applicable.
- [ ] README/ADR updated only when architecture changed.
